title: Quickening Eva 08 split
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by pen-pen » Thu Mar 17, 2011 7:48 pm I'm confused- is Eva Mark.06 & Eva 08 the same model? Or two different types?? They look almost the same.... Anyone?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Mar 17, 2011 8:35 pm They are not explicitly said to be the same, and it is in fact unlikely that they are - Unit 08 apparently has its own pilot, distinct from Kaworu, and is said to be "quickening" (about to be born - actually, could someone clarify whether this is referring to the pilot or the Eva? I've never been sure) - which does not really apply to Mark 06. They do look sort of similar, since both are apparently modeled roughly after Unit 01.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 17, 2011 8:54 pm Azathoth wrote: and is said to be "quickening" (about to be born - actually, could someone clarify whether this is referring to the pilot or the Eva? I've never been sure) -

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Mar 17, 2011 9:16 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: "The quickening Eva-08 and its pilot." Quickening=fetal movement, so it implies the Eva is having fetal movement inside of it. (Yes, it's about the Eva, not the pilot.)

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Thu Mar 17, 2011 9:24 pm A pregnant EVA? God, I don't even want to think about it!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 17, 2011 10:12 pm Azathoth : Exactly. And there was some Eva-01 "birthing" Shinji imagery (well, off-screen except for nekkid fetal-position LCL-soaked Shinji >_>) in Episode 20.

[]:             Quote Post by pen-pen » Thu Mar 17, 2011 11:51 pm I've always wanted to do this: WHO WORE IT BETTER? Eva Mark.06 or Macross Frontier- Lucifer? (LOL) Shot at 2011-03-17

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 18, 2011 12:36 am Gotta find yourself a better picture than that, Pengin-chan. Eva-06 never looked like that -- least of all now!

[]:             Quote Post by pen-pen » Fri Mar 18, 2011 12:45 am Now THAT is a wicked photo, Reichu!! Found this from the net. It's supposed to be EVA 07; art by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto (Not sure whether they're gonna use this design for Rebuild though). I just found it awesome! Shot at 2011-03-17

[]:             Quote Post by COACH » Fri Mar 18, 2011 1:02 am What is that from?

[]:             Quote Post by pen-pen » Fri Mar 18, 2011 1:18 am COACH wrote: What is that from?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 18, 2011 1:25 am It's from a doujinshi series called Eva Fix . The artist is "Chocolate Shop"; the style they do their Evas in is homage-to-the-point-of-ripoff of Ikuto Yamashita. I know you're new here, Pen-Pen, but please try to stay on topic. pen-pen wrote: Now THAT is a wicked photo, Reichu!!

[]:             Quote Post by pen-pen » Fri Mar 18, 2011 2:30 am Reichu wrote: It's from a doujinshi series called Eva Fix . The artist is "Chocolate Shop"; the style they do their Evas in is homage-to-the-point-of-ripoff of Ikuto Yamashita. I know you're new here, Pen-Pen, but please try to stay on topic. It's just a screenshot. You haven't seen the movie?

[]: !             Quote Post by Sik » Sat Mar 26, 2011 11:52 pm Maybe in 3.0 we'll see the 3 institutions trying to control the 3rd impact with their respective EVA's, Gendo with unit 01, Seele with unit 06 and Maybe Mari's boss's with another pilot in unit 08. o.O Pd: in the 3.0 preview is any1 agree with me that unit 08 has a giant Halo (unit06-look like) ?

[]:             Quote Post by Guilt & Innocence » Sun Mar 27, 2011 12:55 am I'm still trying to figure out if I should believe Unit 08 is an evolved Unit 01

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Mar 27, 2011 2:17 am Guilt & Innocence wrote: I'm still trying to figure out if I should believe Unit 08 is an evolved Unit 01

[]:             Quote Post by Guilt & Innocence » Sun Mar 27, 2011 3:51 am Ornette wrote: I think it's completely plausible. At this point who knows what's going to happen (it's kind of exciting).

[]:             Quote Post by Alastor » Mon Mar 28, 2011 12:08 am Perhaps the pilot is a new Dummy Plug series (such as saying the ones Nerv released during the battle with 03 were test types?) and the Quickening refers to that, using the entry plug as reference to the womb instead? YEs, I ripped that partly from the Frued was Right page on TvTropes. >>

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 28, 2011 2:41 pm Here's something to chew on. I think NemZ made this observation a while ago -- not that I believed him then.

[]:             Quote Post by Temjin » Mon Mar 28, 2011 3:26 pm Reichu wrote: Here's something to chew on.
